steps.description: Wait for orders page to render
Extract orders by fetching detail pages directly

jsExtractConfig.extractScript: async function extractOrders(targetOrderIds){var results=[]; var statusMap={'akzeptiert':'processing','versendet':'shipped','geliefert':'delivered','zugestellt':'delivered','storniert':'cancelled','retourniert':'returned','in bearbeitung':'processing'}; for(var i=0;i<targetOrderIds.length;i++){var orderId=targetOrderIds[i]; try{var resp=await fetch('/my-account/orders/'+orderId+'/'); if(!resp.ok){results.push({shopOrderId:orderId,status:null,rawStatus:null,trackingNumber:null,success:false,error:'HTTP '+resp.status}); continue;} var html=await resp.text(); var parser=new DOMParser(); var doc=parser.parseFromString(html,'text/html'); var rawStatus=null; var statusEl=doc.querySelector('span[class*="order-status_component"]'); if(statusEl){rawStatus=(statusEl.textContent||'').trim();} if(!rawStatus){var allEls=doc.querySelectorAll('[class*="order-status"]'); for(var k=0;k<allEls.length;k++){var t=(allEls[k].textContent||'').trim(); if(t&&t.indexOf('Lieferstatus')===-1&&t.length<30){rawStatus=t;break;}}} if(!rawStatus){var bodyText=doc.body?doc.body.textContent||'':''; var sm=bodyText.match(/Lieferstatus\s*(\w[\w\s]*\w)/); if(sm) rawStatus=sm[1].trim();} var status=rawStatus?statusMap[rawStatus.toLowerCase()]||rawStatus:null; var tracking=null; var carrier=null; var links=doc.querySelectorAll('a[href]'); for(var j=0;j<links.length;j++){var href=links[j].getAttribute('href')||''; if(href.indexOf('dhl.de')!==-1){carrier='DHL'; var dm=href.match(/piececode=([A-Z0-9]+)/i); if(dm) tracking=dm[1];} if(href.indexOf('dpd.de')!==-1){carrier='DPD'; var dpm=href.match(/parcelno=([A-Z0-9]+)/i); if(dpm) tracking=dpm[1];} if(href.indexOf('hermes')!==-1){carrier='Hermes';} if(href.indexOf('gls-group')!==-1){carrier='GLS';}} if(!tracking){var bodyEl2=doc.body; var textContent2=bodyEl2?bodyEl2.textContent||'':''; var tm=textContent2.match(/Trackingnummer[:\s]*([A-Z0-9]{8,30})/i); if(tm) tracking=tm[1];} results.push({shopOrderId:orderId,status:status,rawStatus:rawStatus,trackingNumber:tracking,courier:carrier,success:true});} catch(e){results.push({shopOrderId:orderId,status:null,rawStatus:null,trackingNumber:null,success:false,error:e.message});}} return results;} return extractOrders(targetOrderIds);
